steps.title: Read the given slope
steps.content: The equation $y=8x+11$ is in slope-intercept form, so line $v$ has slope $8$.

steps.title: Take the negative reciprocal
steps.content: Perpendicular lines have slopes that are negative reciprocals. For slope $8$, the perpendicular slope is $$ -\frac{1}{8} $$ The answer is D.
